name: 3 ML Bimatoprost Ophthalmic Eye Drops
about: 3 ML Bimatoprost Ophthalmic Eye Drops is a liquid medication recommended for eye use. These eye drops are designed to reduce intraocular pressure in patients diagnosed with glaucoma and ocular hypertension. The active ingredient in these eye drops is Bimatoprost, which is a prostaglandin analogue that works by increasing the outflow of aqueous humour from the eye. The recommended dosage of 3 ML Bimatoprost Ophthalmic Eye Drops is as per the suggestion of the physician. It should be used as directed by the physician for better results. These eye drops should be stored in a dry place to maintain their effectiveness. 3 ML Bimatoprost Ophthalmic Eye Drops are available in a compact size that makes them easy to carry around. They are ideal for those who suffer from glaucoma or ocular hypertension and are looking for an effective medication to manage their condition.
